name: Mist
short_description: 🧬 Uncover the secrets of a ruined world in Mist — a dark RPG with idle mechanics, evolution, and horror vibes. ⚔️ Battle alien horrors, shape your destiny, and search for your missing daughter in a story where every choice matters.
detailed_description:
🌫️ A Dark RPG Journey Through the Mist

Mist is a gripping RPG adventure that blends story-driven exploration, character evolution, and chilling horror elements — all wrapped in an atmospheric idle experience.

👤 Start your path as a fragile human in a world overrun by alien horrors. Evolve, adapt, and become something far greater — or far more terrifying — in your quest to save your missing daughter and uncover the secrets hidden within the Mist.

⚔️ RPG Progression with a Monstrous Twist

Gain experience, unlock new abilities, and transform your appearance as you grow stronger. Your evolution changes everything — your powers, your look, even your morality.

Talk to survivors of the invasion — the Missourians. Friend or foe? Your choices shape the story. Decide who you trust, what you become, and how far you’re willing to go.

🧬 Key Features:

  • FIGHT hordes of alien enemies and face off against deadly bosses.

  • EVOLVE your hero as you gain strength, transforming into a terrifying force.

  • UNLOCK unique superpowers, search for resources, and uncover ancient totems.

  • CHOOSE dialogue options that affect the story and relationships.

  • EXPLORE 8 eerie, story-rich locations inspired by 90s America.

  • IMMERSE yourself in a haunting horror RPG atmosphere with stunning visuals and sound.

🕹️ Idle Mechanics. Active Decisions.

Enjoy a relaxing idle core that lets you grow even while you're away — but don't let your guard down. The world of Mist is dangerous, and every decision counts.

🌑 Will You Remain Human… or Embrace the Monster Within?

Dive into a dark RPG experience like no other. Download Mist now and step into the battle between light and darkness — your destiny awaits.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Indonesian, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Finnish, Swedish, Japanese, Belarusian, Malay, Persian, Hindi
*languages with full audio support
